home.intro: Mediterranean food with your feet in the sand, in Salobreña.
home.manifestoQuote: We are not a beach club. We are the <brand>heartbeat</brand> of the Mediterranean, captured in a glass.
home.kitchenSub: Choose how to start the day — or how to end it.
home.featuredSub: Seasonal produce, embers and plenty of sea.

carta.question: What do you feel like today?
carta.intro: Pick a menu and order at your own pace, no waiting.
carta.preparing: We are getting this menu ready. Come back very soon.
carta.favsEmptyText: Tap the ♥ on the dishes you love and they will show up here.
carta.listEmptyText: Add dishes with the + button and keep them handy when ordering.
carta.buildSub: Pick your bread and pile it up
carta.listNotOrder: This list is not an order or a payment: it just helps you remember what you want and show it to the waiter.
carta.voteText: Vote for it and help others find the best of the menu. It also gets saved to your favourites.

events.noPastText: Once we celebrate our first events, the album of what we lived will be here.
